scripts.test:cli: node --import tsx/esm --test cli/startup/cli.spec.ts && node --import tsx/esm --test cli/lint-staged/cli.spec.ts
scripts.test:api: node --import tsx/esm --test api/main-items/api.spec.ts && node --import tsx/esm --test api/item-pool/api.spec.ts && node --import tsx/esm --test api/regression/api.spec.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:cli && npm run test:api
